title: Incorrect result when join condition uses a table-valued function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id UInt32, json String);
CREATE TABLE t2(id UInt32, json String);
SELECT * FROM t2 CROSS JOIN t1 WHERE arrayExists(x -> x = t2.id, JSONExtractArrayRaw(t1.json, 'items'));
key_bug_features: JOIN condition uses a table-valued function incorrectly
